---
title: "BBB 26 — Cartola"
subtitle: "Sistema de pontuação Cartola BBB"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict
import sys

sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    CARTOLA_POINTS, POINTS_LABELS, POINTS_EMOJI, get_week_number,
    load_cartola_data, load_manual_events,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()

def contrast_color(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    if len(hex_color) != 6:
        return '#fff'
    r, g, b = (int(hex_color[i:i+2], 16) for i in (0, 2, 4))
    luminance = (0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b) / 255
    return '#000' if luminance > 0.6 else '#fff'

# Load precomputed Cartola data
cartola = load_cartola_data()

leaderboard = cartola["leaderboard"]
stats = cartola["stats"]
n_weeks = cartola["_metadata"]["n_weeks"]
weekly_points = cartola["weekly_points"]

n_with_points = stats["n_with_points"]
n_active = stats["n_active"]
total_positive = stats["total_positive"]
total_negative = stats["total_negative"]
seen_roles = stats["seen_roles"]
current_roles = stats["current_roles"]
leader = leaderboard[0] if leaderboard else None

# Build participant info / avatars / colors from leaderboard
PARTICIPANT_INFO = {}
AVATARS = {}
for entry in leaderboard:
    name = entry['name']
    PARTICIPANT_INFO[name] = {
        'grupo': entry['grupo'],
        'avatar': entry['avatar'],
        'active': entry['active'],
    }
    if entry['avatar']:
        AVATARS[name] = entry['avatar']

all_participants = sorted(PARTICIPANT_INFO.keys())
palette = (
    px.colors.qualitative.Plotly + px.colors.qualitative.D3 +
    px.colors.qualitative.Set2 + px.colors.qualitative.Bold
)
participant_colors = {name: palette[i % len(palette)] for i, name in enumerate(all_participants)}

# Reconstruct all_points from weekly_points (for evolution chart + weekly tabs)
all_points = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(list))
for week_str, participants in weekly_points.items():
    week = int(week_str)
    for participant, events in participants.items():
        for evt_data in events:
            all_points[participant][week].append(tuple(evt_data))

# Load manual events (for weekly notes / Big Fone display)
manual_events = load_manual_events()
if not manual_events:
    manual_events = {'participants': {}, 'weekly_events': [], 'special_events': [], 'power_events': [], 'cartola_points_log': []}

weekly_data = manual_events.get('weekly_events', [])
```

```{python}
#| label: destaques
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DESTAQUES - Key highlights at the top (matching index.qmd style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

highlights = []

if leader and leader['total'] != 0:
    grupo = leader['grupo']
    highlights.append(f"🏆 **{leader['name']}** ({grupo}) lidera com **{leader['total']:+d}** pontos")

# Current roles from precomputed data
if current_roles.get('Líder'):
    name = current_roles['Líder']
    highlights.append(f"👑 Líder atual: **{name}** (+80 pts)")
if current_roles.get('Anjo'):
    name = current_roles['Anjo']
    highlights.append(f"😇 Anjo: **{name}** (+45 pts)")
if current_roles.get('Monstro'):
    names = ', '.join(current_roles['Monstro'])
    highlights.append(f"👹 Monstro: **{names}** (-10 pts)")
if current_roles.get('Paredão'):
    names = ', '.join(current_roles['Paredão'])
    highlights.append(f"🗳️ No Paredão: **{names}** (-15 pts)")

# Worst score
bottom = [p for p in leaderboard if p['total'] < 0]
if bottom:
    worst = min(bottom, key=lambda x: x['total'])
    status = manual_events.get('participants', {}).get(worst['name'], {}).get('status', '')
    status_text = f" ({status})" if status else ""
    highlights.append(f"📉 Pior pontuação: **{worst['name']}** ({worst['total']:+d}){status_text}")

if highlights:
    print(f'''
<div class="info-panel u-s050">
<div class="u-s035">Destaques Cartola — Semana {n_weeks}</div>
<ul class="u-s073">
''')
    for h in highlights:
        print(f"<li>{h}</li>")
    print("</ul></div>")
```

```{python}
#| label: kpi-boxes
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# KPI Value Boxes (matching index.qmd style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

n_lideres = len(seen_roles.get('Líder', []))
n_anjos = len(seen_roles.get('Anjo', []))
n_monstros = len(seen_roles.get('Monstro', []))

print(f'''
<div class="stat-row">

<div class="stat-card u-s045">
<div class="stat-value">{n_weeks}</div>
<div class="stat-label">📅 Semana Atual</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s006">
<div class="stat-value">{n_lideres}</div>
<div class="stat-label">👑 Líderes</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s004">
<div class="stat-value">{n_anjos}</div>
<div class="stat-label">😇 Anjos</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s003">
<div class="stat-value">{total_positive:+d}</div>
<div class="stat-label">📈 Pts Positivos</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s005">
<div class="stat-value">{total_negative:+d}</div>
<div class="stat-label">📉 Pts Negativos</div>
</div>

</div>

<p class="text-muted small u-s038">Pontos calculados automaticamente da API (Líder, Anjo, Monstro, Paredão, VIP) + eventos manuais.</p>
''')
```

# Ranking Cartola {#ranking}

Pontuação acumulada de todos os participantes. Cores representam cada participante.

```{python}
#| label: leaderboard-cards
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Leaderboard with participant cards (matching Perfis Individuais style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Show all participants with points + top 5 with 0
with_points = [p for p in leaderboard if p['total'] != 0]
zero_points = [p for p in leaderboard if p['total'] == 0 and p['active']][:5]
display_list = with_points + zero_points

if display_list:
    print('<div class="info-grid u-s071">')

    for i, p in enumerate(display_list):
        rank = i + 1 if p['total'] != 0 else '—'
        participant_color = participant_colors.get(p['name'], '#666')
        badge_text_color = contrast_color(participant_color)
        avatar_url = p['avatar'] or ''
        status_badge = ''

        # Determine card border color based on ranking/status
        if not p['active']:
            border_color = '#6c757d'  # Gray for exited
            status_text = manual_events.get('participants', {}).get(p['name'], {}).get('status', 'saiu')
            status_badge = f'<span class="fs-xs u-s002">{status_text}</span>'
        elif rank == 1:
            border_color = '#f1c40f'  # Gold for 1st
        elif isinstance(rank, int) and rank <= 3:
            border_color = '#27ae60'  # Green for top 3
        elif p['total'] < 0:
            border_color = '#e74c3c'  # Red for negative
        elif p['total'] > 0:
            border_color = '#3498db'  # Blue for positive
        else:
            border_color = '#444'  # Dark for zero

        # Format events for this participant (grouped by type)
        events_html = ''
        if p['events']:
            event_stats = defaultdict(lambda: {'count': 0, 'total': 0})
            for evt in p['events']:
                event_stats[evt['event']]['count'] += 1
                event_stats[evt['event']]['total'] += evt['points']

            event_tags = []
            for evt_type, stats_item in sorted(event_stats.items(), key=lambda x: -abs(x[1]['total'])):
                emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(evt_type, '•')
                label = POINTS_LABELS.get(evt_type, evt_type)
                total_pts = stats_item['total']
                count = stats_item['count']
                pts_color = '#27ae60' if total_pts > 0 else '#e74c3c'
                count_prefix = f"{count}x " if count > 1 else ""
                event_tags.append(
                    f'<span class="fs-sm u-s021">'
                    f'{count_prefix}{emoji} {label} <span style="color: {pts_color}; font-weight: bold;">{total_pts:+d}</span></span>'
                )
            events_html = f'<div class="u-s078">{"".join(event_tags)}</div>'

        # Points display
        pts_color = '#27ae60' if p['total'] > 0 else ('#e74c3c' if p['total'] < 0 else '#888')
        rank_display = f"{rank}º" if isinstance(rank, int) else rank

        print(f'''
<div style="background: #2a2a2a; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid {border_color}; padding: 1rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;">
<div class="u-s062">
''')
        if avatar_url:
            print(f'<img src="{avatar_url}" alt="{p["name"]}" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid {participant_color}; object-fit: cover;">')
        else:
            print(f'<div class="fs-3xl" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid {participant_color}; background: #444; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #888;">?</div>')

        # Rank badge
        if isinstance(rank, int) and rank <= 3:
            rank_emoji = '🥇' if rank == 1 else ('🥈' if rank == 2 else '🥉')
            print(f'<div class="fs-xl u-s106">{rank_emoji}</div>')

        print(f'''
</div>
<div class="u-s063">
<div class="u-s050">
<div>
<span class="fs-xl u-s010">{rank_display} {p['name']}</span>
<span class="fs-xs" style="background: {participant_color}; color: {badge_text_color}; padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 0.5rem;">{p['grupo']}</span>
{status_badge}
</div>
<div class="fs-3xl" style="font-weight: bold; color: {pts_color};">{p['total']:+d}</div>
</div>
{events_html}
</div>
</div>
''')

    print('</div>')
else:
    print('<p class="text-muted">Nenhum participante encontrado.</p>')
```

Pontuação acumulada ao longo das semanas.

```{python}
#| label: evolution-chart

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Evolution chart (matching trajetoria.qmd style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

cumulative_evolution = cartola.get("cumulative_evolution", [])

if cumulative_evolution:
    df = pd.DataFrame(cumulative_evolution)
    df.rename(columns={"week": "Semana", "name": "Participante", "cumulative_points": "Pontos"}, inplace=True)

    # Final scores for legend ordering
    final_scores = df.groupby('Participante')['Pontos'].last().to_dict()
    sorted_participants = sorted(final_scores.keys(), key=lambda x: -final_scores[x])

    fig = go.Figure()

    for name in sorted_participants:
        df_p = df[df['Participante'] == name].sort_values('Semana')
        if df_p.empty:
            continue

        color = participant_colors.get(name, '#666')
        final_pts = final_scores[name]

        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=df_p['Semana'],
            y=df_p['Pontos'],
            mode='lines+markers',
            name=f"{name} ({final_pts:+d})",
            line=dict(color=color, width=2),
            marker=dict(size=10, color=color),
            hovertemplate=f'{name}<br>Semana %{{x}}: %{{y:+d}} pts<extra></extra>',
        ))

    fig.update_layout(
        title="Evolução da Pontuação Cartola",
        xaxis_title="Semana",
        yaxis_title="Pontos Acumulados",
        xaxis=dict(tickmode='linear', tick0=1, dtick=1),
        yaxis=dict(zeroline=True, zerolinecolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', zerolinewidth=1),
        height=500,
        hovermode='x unified',
        legend=dict(font=dict(size=10)),
    )

    fig.show()
else:
    print("*Dados insuficientes para gerar o gráfico de evolução.*")
```

# Semanas {#semanas}

Detalhamento semanal: papéis e pontuações detectados da API.

```{python}
#| label: weekly-tabs
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Weekly breakdown in tabset (matching trajetoria.qmd style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

if n_weeks > 0:
    print('::: {.panel-tabset}\n')
    for week in range(1, n_weeks + 1):
        # Get manual week info if available (for Big Fone, notes, etc.)
        week_info = next((w for w in weekly_data if w.get('week') == week), None)

        print(f'## Semana {week}\n')

        # Extract roles from auto-detected points (all_points)
        week_roles = {'Líder': set(), 'Anjo': set(), 'Monstro': set(), 'Imune': set()}
        for participant, weeks_data in all_points.items():
            if week in weeks_data:
                for event, pts, date in weeks_data[week]:
                    if event == 'lider':
                        week_roles['Líder'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'anjo':
                        week_roles['Anjo'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'monstro':
                        week_roles['Monstro'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'imunizado':
                        week_roles['Imune'].add(participant)

        # Role cards
        lider = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Líder'])) or '—'
        anjo = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Anjo'])) or '—'
        monstro = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Monstro'])) or '—'
        imune = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Imune'])) or '—'

        lider_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Líder'])[0], '') if week_roles['Líder'] else ''
        anjo_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Anjo'])[0], '') if week_roles['Anjo'] else ''
        imune_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Imune'])[0], '') if week_roles['Imune'] else ''
        monstro_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Monstro'])[0], '') if week_roles['Monstro'] else ''

        print(f'''
<div class="u-s049">

<div class="u-s379">
''')
        if lider_avatar and lider != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{lider_avatar}" class="u-s482">')
        print(f'''
<div>
<div class="fs-sm u-s231">👑 Líder</div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s010">{lider}</div>
<div class="fs-base u-s051">+80 pts</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="u-s376">
''')
        if anjo_avatar and anjo != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{anjo_avatar}" class="u-s479">')
        print(f'''
<div>
<div class="fs-sm u-s216">😇 Anjo</div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s010">{anjo}</div>
<div class="fs-base u-s051">+45 pts</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="u-s377">
''')
        if imune_avatar and imune != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{imune_avatar}" class="u-s480">')
        print(f'''
<div>
<div class="fs-sm u-s218">🛡️ Imune</div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s010">{imune}</div>
<div class="fs-base u-s051">+30 pts</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="u-s378">
<div class="u-s303">
''')
        if monstro_avatar and monstro != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{monstro_avatar}" class="u-s481">')
        print(f'''
<div>
<div class="fs-sm u-s228">👹 Monstro</div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s010">{monstro}</div>
<div class="fs-base u-s224">-10 pts</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
''')

        # Special events from manual data
        if week_info:
            special_events = []
            raw_bf = week_info.get('big_fone')
            bf_list = raw_bf if isinstance(raw_bf, list) else ([raw_bf] if isinstance(raw_bf, dict) else [])
            for bf in bf_list:
                if isinstance(bf, dict) and bf.get('atendeu'):
                    special_events.append(f"📞 **Big Fone**: {bf.get('atendeu', '?')} atendeu — {bf.get('consequencia', '')}")
            if week_info.get('caixas_surpresa'):
                cs = week_info['caixas_surpresa']
                special_events.append(f"🎁 **Caixas-Surpresa**: {cs.get('resultado', '')}")
            if week_info.get('notes'):
                special_events.append(f"📝 {week_info['notes']}")

            if special_events:
                print('\n**Eventos especiais:**\n')
                for se in special_events:
                    print(f"- {se}")
                print()

        # All points this week (from API + manual)
        week_points_list = []
        for participant in all_points:
            if week in all_points[participant]:
                events = all_points[participant][week]
                total = sum(pts for _, pts, _ in events)
                info = PARTICIPANT_INFO.get(participant, {'grupo': 'Pipoca'})
                week_points_list.append({
                    'name': participant,
                    'total': total,
                    'events': events,
                    'grupo': info.get('grupo', 'Pipoca'),
                    'avatar': AVATARS.get(participant, '')
                })

        week_points_list = sorted(week_points_list, key=lambda x: -x['total'])

        if week_points_list:
            print('\n**Pontuações da semana:**\n')
            print('<div class="info-grid u-s398">')

            for wp in week_points_list:
                participant_color = participant_colors.get(wp['name'], '#666')
                pts_color = '#27ae60' if wp['total'] > 0 else '#e74c3c'
                avatar = wp['avatar']

                events_str = ' '.join([f"{POINTS_EMOJI.get(e, '•')}" for e, _, _ in wp['events']])

                print(f'''
<div style="background: #2a2a2a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.8rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem; border-left: 3px solid {participant_color};">
''')
                if avatar:
                    print(f'<img src="{avatar}" style="width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid {participant_color}; object-fit: cover;">')
                print(f'''
<div class="u-s380">
<div class="u-s010">{wp['name']}</div>
<div class="fs-md u-s020">{events_str}</div>
</div>
<div class="fs-2xl" style="font-weight: bold; color: {pts_color};">{wp['total']:+d}</div>
</div>
''')

                print('</div>')
        else:
            print('\n*Nenhum ponto registrado nesta semana.*\n')

        print()

    print(':::')
else:
    print('*Nenhuma semana registrada ainda.*\n')
```

# Sistema de Pontos {#pontos}

<div class="info-panel u-s018">

**Como funciona o Cartola BBB**

O Cartola BBB é um sistema de fantasy onde cada evento do jogo pontua. Os pontos são **calculados automaticamente** da API para eventos detectáveis (Líder, Anjo, Monstro, Paredão, VIP) e complementados com eventos manuais (Big Fone, saídas).

**Observações**: seguimos as regras oficiais, mas **não modelamos** a janela de escalação nem palpites — calculamos pelos eventos reais do jogo.
**Regras-chave**: Líder não acumula com outros itens; Anjo autoimune acumula com Imunizado; Imunizado não acumula com Não Emparedado/Não recebeu votos/Salvo.

</div>

```{python}
#| label: points-reference
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Points reference table (matching dashboard style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

print('''
<div class="info-grid">

<div class="u-s123">
<h4 class="u-s212">📈 Eventos Positivos</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base">
''')

for event, points in CARTOLA_POINTS.items():
    if points > 0:
        emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(event, '•')
        label = POINTS_LABELS.get(event, event)
        # Mark auto-detected events
        auto = ' <span class="text-muted fs-xs">(API)</span>' if event in ['lider', 'anjo', 'imunizado', 'vip'] else ''
        print(f'<tr><td class="text-light u-s019">{emoji} {label}{auto}</td><td class="tr u-s211">+{points}</td></tr>')

print('''
</table>
</div>

<div class="u-s121">
<h4 class="u-s225">📉 Eventos Negativos</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base">
''')

for event, points in CARTOLA_POINTS.items():
    if points < 0:
        emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(event, '•')
        label = POINTS_LABELS.get(event, event)
        # Mark auto-detected events
        auto = ' <span class="text-muted fs-xs">(API)</span>' if event in ['monstro', 'emparedado'] else ''
        print(f'<tr><td class="text-light u-s019">{emoji} {label}{auto}</td><td class="tr u-s023">{points}</td></tr>')

print('''
</table>
</div>

</div>
''')

print('<p class="text-muted small">Eventos marcados com <span class="text-muted">(API)</span> são detectados automaticamente dos snapshots diários.</p>')
print('<p class="text-muted small">Regras: <strong>Salvo do Paredão</strong> = venceu o Bate e Volta; <strong>Não Eliminado</strong> = indicado que permaneceu; <strong>Não Emparedado</strong> = disponível para votação e fora da lista final (exclui líder/anjo/imunizados e quem venceu o Bate e Volta).</p>')
```

::: {.callout-note title="Fontes de Dados"}
- **Automático (API)**: Líder, Anjo, Monstro, Paredão, Imune, VIP — detectados dos snapshots diários
- **Manual**: Big Fone, Quarto Secreto, saídas (desistência/eliminação) — registrados em `data/manual_events.json`
:::
